title: taraxacum pulchellum
intro: Taraxacum pulchellum, also known as the small dandelion or lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as arthritis and kidney stones. The health benefits of Taraxacum pulchellum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, among other benefits. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional medicine formulas to leverage its medicinal properties.
